flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Virginia University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (28.4% → 19.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Virginia University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (44.3% → 33.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Virginia University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.0k → $21.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Virginia University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.0k → $21.3k).
